introduction: Data Manipulation Language (DML) statements are used for managing data within schema objects. Unlike DDL, DML operations manipulate the data itself, not the structure.

sections.title: INSERT Command
sections.content: Used to insert new rows of data into a table.

sections.title: UPDATE Command
sections.content: Used to modify the existing records in a table. It is crucial to use the WHERE clause, otherwise all rows will be updated.
sections.code: UPDATE Students SET Name = 'Alice Smith' WHERE ID = 1;

sections.title: DELETE Command
sections.content: Used to delete existing records in a table. Like UPDATE, the WHERE clause is essential to avoid deleting all records.

sections.title: SELECT Command
sections.content: Although sometimes categorized as DQL (Data Query Language), SELECT is often grouped with DML. It retrieves data from one or more tables.
